description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on every push. Use a matrix job strategy to compile on multiple operating systems (Windows, macOS 10.15, macOS 11, Ubuntu 18.04, and Ubuntu 20.04) in both debug and release modes. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, set up luamake, and run luamake with the specified mode. On macOS 11, also build a universal version, and on Linux, run an additional test to check the glibc version.
